name: AfdxOutputPacketRaw
title: AfdxOutputPacketRaw
description: The specified AFDX message is transmitted without considering the internal AFDX software stack.
This call is equivalent to AfdxOutputPacket( packet, SingleShot, NoIPFragmentation, NoAFDXVLScheduling, NoAFDXSeqNoManagement, MACIFRelated ).

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of the message to send that has been created with AfdxInitPacket.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
